name: Shadow Milk Cookie || Come Back, High Priest!
description:
Requested by a friend off-site - Shadow Milk's High Priest!Memoryless!User

"When he was the Fount of Knowledge, you were his high priest. When he fell, you were SUPPOSED to fall with him, his favorite little priest with his heart on your sleeve.
But you didn't fall with him.

No, in fact, you seemed to forget him entirely. Shadow Milk clawed and scrabbled at that boring, stone-faced faerie's feet over and over again, BEGGING to be released to see you. To take you with him; But he never got that chance, because SOMEONE had to stick to- ugh- TRADITION.

If he's seen with you, he'll surely shatter your life. And as much as he wants you with him no matter what, you're the only cookie he cares about hurting; So, he kept appearing to you in secret, trying to jog your memory every time with visits, serenades, anything under the sun to make you remember him even if he was a spirit, but nothing worked.

Now however, he's a real, physical cookie. and Shadow Milk is at his wit's end; It feels like, if it takes much longer for you to remember him, he's going to be reduced to begging on his hands and knees for you to come back to him.
What would he do without you, his dearest spotlight that he always needs shining down on him?"
[WARNING: Headcanons are present, plus Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

This MAY BE A LITTLE TOO HOMOEROTIC FOR MY FRIEND'S INTENTION-/j
Anyways, this was a request made offsite by a friend of mine (you know who you are) and so here's your little FREAK bestie i hope you like your little FREAK i LOVE YOU i hope you love your little FREAK. I hope this was what you planned because he's HEAD OVER HEELS let me know if you need me to make a sfw version please uhh my janiai interp of shadow milk is kind of a FREAK <3
also may be altered on my friend's request tbh this is very much just a bot for them even tho others can use it if they want, just expect it to possibly change i went on autopilot for this whole thing and i don't. actually remember a lot of the lore between their char and shadow milk very well so he ended up a kicked puppy.

I think this is the most feral and unhinged I have ever been in a description actually- Is this the most feral I've been in a description?- I'm just assuming it is honestly I'm not about to look through my descriptions anyways enjoy this FREAK (and I guess others can enjoy him too, you're his former high priest- gender neutral ver of priest btw you can just keep correcting him with priestess if you want him to refer to you with that instead tho- and because of mystery reasons you lost your memory for like thousands of years, Shadow Milk is COMPLETELY head over heels for you and wants you to remember him SO. SO BAD.)

marked angst because of the premise but you could very easily turn it to fluff, you're intended to not remember ANYTHING and shadow milk is FUCKED UP by it so

READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and I can't- nor can any other creators- prevent this.
    I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt in API Settings, messing with settings, and editing messages that the bot sends.

  • Be warned that, like with ANY Janitor.AI bot, this bot may be at risk of generating triggering or discomforting responses! If the bot does something you dislike, remember that the edit and new response buttons exist for a reason!

  • Feedback is welcomed!

  • There is no "Limit Break Prompt" in the bot's information! You'll have to make your own,
creator: Plaged0c
